title: 大阪杯の後に・Just a Dream...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion manages another incredible run at
the Osaka Hai, but her usual joy from racing has
gone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that she's facing more pressure than
even she can play down, Fine Motion opens up to
me and shares her true feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's sad that her fun is almost over, and that the
time she's spent in Japan—which feels like a
dream come true—is going to vanish as if it were
a dream. It also pains her to think that everyone
might forget her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion smiles as if a weight has been lifted
from her after opening up about her feelings. But
I wonder whether it's a good idea for us to go on
like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Harboring mixed feelings, the both of us prepare
for the next race—the Takarazuka Kinen, a Grand
Prix race where entrants are selected by fan vote.
